query: Microsoft Purview DLP Copilot Chat worldwide rollout sensitive data protection web searches 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"Microsoft Purview DLP Copilot Chat worldwide rollout sensitive data protection web searches 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2117,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/dlp-microsoft365-copilot-location-learn-about","title":"Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat | Microsoft Learn","content":"Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) can help you protect interactions with Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat in the following ways:
When this control is enabled, Copilot excludes external emails received by users from being referenced or summarized during prompt processing, while continuing to use internal Microsoft 365 data sources where permitted.
When a user submits a prompt containing those SITs, Copilot doesn't send the prompt to external web search providers.
During preview, the user messaging in Word, Excel, PowerPoint might not clearly state that the interaction with Copilot in those products is blocked due to an organizational policy.
Content contains > Sensitivity labels — Prevent Copilot from processing content — Detects when a file or an email in Exchange has a chosen sensitivity label."},{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft-security-blog/safeguarding-sensitive-data-in-microsoft-365-copilot-interactions-dlp-for-micros/4512497","title":"Safeguarding Sensitive Data in Microsoft 365 Copilot Interactions: DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"At Ignite 2025, Microsoft announced a major enhancement: Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat prompts, now entering General Availability.
In November 2024, Microsoft introduced the ability to create a DLP policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat from processing sensitive files and emails using Sensitivity Labels for grounding data.
- Protect PII, financial data, and intellectual property: Financial institutions can block prompts containing deal terms, account numbers, or other sensitive data, preventing leaks through AI interactions."},{"url":"https://mc.merill.net/message/MC1263277","title":"MC1263277 - Microsoft Purview | DLP to safeguard sensitive data from external web search in Microsoft 356 Copilot and Copilot Chat | Microsoft 365 Message Center Archive","content":"Microsoft Purview DLP will add real-time evaluation to block sensitive data in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat from external web searches.
The feature rolls out from March to June 2026, requires admin policy updates, and enables monitoring via DLP alerts and Activity Explorer.
General Availability (Worldwide): Rollout begins in late May 2026 (previously late June) and completes in late June 2026 (previously late July)."},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/whats-new","title":"What's new in Microsoft Purview | Microsoft Learn","content":"In preview: Protect sensitive data in text and prompts by integrating with Microsoft Entra Global Secure Access (GSA).
In preview: Enhanced matched conditions for Exchange DLP events surfaces detailed non-sensitive information type (SIT) condition matches in DLP alerts and Activity Explorer for Exchange Online.
Preview: Data loss prevention policy tip reference for Outlook for Android, iOS, and macOS.
Microsoft Purview enables software development companies to integrate governance, protection, and compliance capabilities into their applications using SDKs and APIs."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benceorban_there-are-many-organizations-whore-still-activity-7452281050602512384-U9mw","title":"Microsoft 365 Copilot Web Search Safeguards Sensitive Data | Bence Orban posted on the topic | LinkedIn","content":"Full admin visibility. ✔ Prompt‑level protection ✔ Included with M365 Copilot & Copilot Chat ✔ Integrated with Purview + DSPM guided setup This is critical for enterprise‑ready AI adoption - enabling productivity without compromising data security or compliance.
⚠️ Change Alert! ⚠️ In July 2026, Microsoft will be modifying the Semi-Annual Enterprise Channel for M365 updates."}]}

tavily.raw:
{"query":"Microsoft Purview DLP Copilot Chat worldwide rollout sensitive data protection web searches 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft-security-blog/safeguarding-sensitive-data-in-microsoft-365-copilot-interactions-dlp-for-micros/4512497","title":"Safeguarding Sensitive Data in Microsoft 365 Copilot Interactions: DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"# Safeguarding Sensitive Data in Microsoft 365 Copilot Interactions: DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot. At Ignite 2025, Microsoft announced a major enhancement: **Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat prompts**, now entering General Availability. In November 2024, Microsoft introduced the ability to create a DLP policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat from processing sensitive files and emails using Sensitivity Labels for grounding data. The latest feature entering Public Preview is **DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to prevent web searches for prompts containing sensitive data**. The rest of this blog focuses on a key addition to this capability set: **DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot + Copilot Chat prompts to prevent processing of prompts containing sensitive information**, now entering General Availability.","score":0.81524754,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://mc.merill.net/message/MC1181998","title":"MC1181998 - Microsoft Purview | Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts | Microsoft 365 Message Center Archive","content":"# MC1181998- Microsoft Purview | Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts. This announcement expired on **Jun 1, 2026** and is no longer active in Message Center. Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) is expanding to support Microsoft 365 Copilot, preventing sensitive data in prompts from being used or returned in responses. We are expanding Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) to support Microsoft 365 Copilot, helping organizations safeguard prompts that contain sensitive data. * **Public Preview:** We will begin rolling out in mid-November 2025 and expect to complete by late December 2025. * Admins managing Microsoft Purview DLP policies for Microsoft 365 Copilot. * Admins can configure DLP policies in the *Microsoft Purview portal* to restrict Copilot from processing prompts containing selected sensitive information types (SITs), including default and custom SITs. Admins can configure this default policy from the Purview portal or the Microsoft Admin Center. You can learn more about the Microsoft Admin Center experience in Message Center post MC1182689.","score":0.80735475,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/khurram-hafeez-2793437_microsoft365-copilot-purview-activity-7391137946642448385-vNEH","title":"Microsoft Purview DLP Now Controls Copilot’s Access to Sensitive Email Data","content":"Microsoft Purview DLP Now Controls Copilot’s Access to Sensitive Email Data. FacebookTwitterPinterest controls to Copilot’s handling of sensitive email data. Microsoft is set to enhance data security in Microsoft 365 by extending Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) controls to Copilot’s handling of sensitive email data. Starting January 1, 2025, Microsoft 365 Copilot will be prevented from processing emails that carry sensitivity labels, marking a significant step forward in enterprise data protection. ## **New Protections for Sensitive Emails**. Microsoft Purview DLP has long enabled organizations to monitor and protect sensitive information across Microsoft 365 services. With this update, DLP policies can now detect sensitivity labels in emails and restrict Copilot from using these emails as grounding data in chat experiences. Organizations that already have DLP policies configured for Copilot will see these protections extended to cover sensitive emails without any additional setup. Admins should create a new DLP policy using the Copilot location to use this feature.","score":0.77731717,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4KEGDvcZPeY","title":"DLP for Copilot Prompts: Stop Sensitive Data From Leaving Copilot With This Purview Setting","content":"DLP for Copilot Prompts: Stop Sensitive Data From Leaving Copilot With This Purview Setting
Microsoft Healthcare and Life Blog Videos
3250 subscribers
4 likes
203 views
12 Jun 2026
Copilot's web grounding can send your prompt data out to Bing Search, outside your tenant boundary and outside your Microsoft privacy agreements. I sat down with Arlie, one of our Purview solutions engineers and a former CISO, to show how Purview's DLP for Copilot prompts stops that without turning off Copilot's reasoning altogether.
In this video:

How Copilot's orchestrator checks prompts against Purview DLP rules
The difference between blocking a prompt entirely vs. just blocking web search
How sensitivity labels factor into Copilot DLP policies
What shows up in Activity Explorer for AI activity
Simulation mode and how to tune rules before going live
Licensing: what you need (E5 / Information Protection and Governance) and how it covers both Copilot Chat and full Microsoft 365 Copilot
